claim: Tier 7.7z-r1 scores v2.6 (edge-of-chaos + ridge) against ESN and lag-ridge baselines on Mackey-Glass/Lorenz/NARMA10 at 8000-32000 steps, seeds 42/43/44. v2.6 ridge MSE=1.90e-06 beats ESN ridge=5.30e-06 (2.8x), lag-ridge=4.81e-07 beats v2.6 (4x). Internal capability improved vs v2.5; strongest simple baseline (lag-ridge) still wins.
caveat: Benchmark scoring with ridge readout. v2.5 comparison uses different readout (online LMS) so ratio is not directly comparable. Not public usefulness proof. Not hardware/native transfer.
